subject: Fix Id-searches endpoint performance degradation
commit_message:
Fix Id-searches endpoint performance degradation

- create more flexible control over fetch descendants
- add a new FETCH_DIRECT_CHILDREN_ONLY option to fetch descendants
options
- enabel create custom fetch descendants option

Reviewer: Toine, Joe, Priyank
Issue-ID: CPS-1216
Change-Id: I900b32e813367aa9566c1dec986b20f009d27203
Signed-off-by: kissand <andras.zoltan.kiss@est.tech>

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-2

(5 comments)

Hi Andras, sorry for the delay looking into this
but your main problem is scope. You are introducing changes that have nothing to do with the performance fix in the same commit?!

Please remove them if need please discuss with me the need for those changes, we might need a separate Jira/bug for them.
